mundo.titulo: Lammy says he told JD Vance his Nowak comments were 'wrong'

tecnologia.titulo: GOG apologizes for emailing people Nazi symbols
tecnologia.resumen: GOG sent a newsletter about the game The End of the Sun on June 5th that included symbols associated with the Nazi SS.
